item.title: The Creative Director of Code - Orchestrating Agents, Building Systems
item.description: Programming is shifting from writing code to directing agents, where the key skill is managing uncertainty

item.title: The IDE of the future
item.description: What makes up a good IDE in 2026 and beyond? Let’s have a look!
